hero.title: Collectors of Light
hero.description: This season's lead exhibition brings painting, photography, and installation into a single sensory rhythm. The opening screen is structured around the current show so first-time visitors can immediately read the tone of the space.
hero.location: 100 Yesul-ro, Jung-gu, Seoul, Glitter Gallery Main Hall
hero.visual_description: The hero image area is built as a visual placeholder so the layout keeps its ratio and mood even before a real exhibition image is connected.

featured.section_title: The show we want to surface first
featured.title: Collectors of Light
featured.description: A season-leading exhibition where painting, photography, and installation are tuned to read as one scene.

exhibition_list.section_title: Cards that read status and schedule together
exhibition_list.current_description: A large group show designed so visitors experience different densities along the viewing path.
exhibition_list.upcoming_description: An upcoming exhibition card that builds anticipation for the next season while keeping schedule and tone visible.
exhibition_list.archive_description: Closed exhibitions remain inside the same card system so the archive retains continuity even when live data is missing.

artists.section_title: Artists shaping the texture of the space
artists.artist1_description: Explores the thickness of surfaces where light lingers and carefully stages the sensory difference between distant and close viewing.
artists.artist2_description: Records the grain of time by placing urban afterglow against quiet interiors, supporting the exhibition's lyricism.
artists.artist3_description: Treats viewer movement and sightline height as part of the exhibition and binds the entire room into one scene.

collection.item1_description: A work built from thin layers of color that leave a small motion inside an otherwise still surface.
collection.item2_description: A photo series that records the indoor warmth left behind after daylight has faded.
collection.item3_description: A drawing that suggests direction through the tension between line and blank space while preserving card density when live data is absent.

space.section_title: A layout where the work breathes first
space.description: Glitter Gallery builds atmosphere through restraint, material texture, and whitespace, while keeping exhibition information legible without breaking that flow.

visit.address: 2F, 100 Yesul-ro, Jung-gu, Seoul / 7-minute walk from Euljiro 3-ga Station Line 3
visit.description: Schedules may change, so visitors should review the latest operating notice before arriving.

cta.section_title: If you want to experience the exhibition in person, check visit information and contact first.
cta.description: The footer CTA links viewing hours, location, program guidance, and inquiry flow into one final action path.
